description_long: This is a large, freestanding wooden cabinet with a dark, weathered finish, featuring a two-part structure. The upper section consists of open shelving divided into two columns, each with three spacious shelves, ideal for displaying or storing items. The lower section contains a row of four drawers above three paneled doors, each likely concealing additional storage compartments. The cabinet is adorned with simple, functional metal handles on both the drawers and doors, contributing to its utilitarian yet classic appearance. The wood grain and patina suggest age and durability, making it suitable for urban environments such as shops, garages, or communal spaces. The overall construction is robust, with a wide, overhanging top and solid base, ensuring stability and ample storage capacity.
description: A large, weathered wooden cabinet with open shelves above and drawers and doors below, featuring metal handles and a robust, classic design.
description_view_0: Front view showing open shelves, four drawers, and three paneled doors with metal handles.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the depth of the cabinet and the overhanging top, with no visible shelves or doors.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain, flat wooden back panel with visible wood grain and no openings.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring the depth and overhanging top, with no visible interactive features.
